problem id: e7f1ac8e
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(3) AND NOT SHL(5)

examples:
  00100110 -> 00110001
  01000010 -> 00010010
  11001010 -> 00010110
  10000101 -> 00001100
  01110000 -> 10000011
  00010101 -> 00001000
  00111100 -> 01100001
  10111110 -> 00110101
  00001101 -> 01001000
  01111110 -> 00110011

query: 10001001
predicted answer: 01001100
